svg.title: AXLE sorry roadmap — v5 through v8.2
svg.desc: Complete guide to closing all sorry marks across the AXLE Lean files
svg.text: AXLE sorry roadmap — what to do next
v5 · v6.1 · v8.2 synthesised · 9 sorrys across 4 categories

g.onclick: sendPrompt('Write the Lean 4 proof for ADMIT-A1 in Main_v8_2')
sendPrompt('Port sup_lt_of_regular and sup_strictMono_isLimit from Main_v5 to Main_v8_2')
g.text: Already proved in v5. Port only.

svg.text: — closeable now (above) vs needs Mathlib update (below) —

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How do we discharge ADMIT-B crystal_lockin once Mathlib norm_num covers Fin 12 matrices?')
g.text: File PR or use norm_num ext

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What Mathlib APIs are needed to prove gronwall_contraction ODE version and gtct_t1 Floquet theory?')
sendPrompt('What is the proof strategy for dm3_euler_preservation and dm3_volume_invariant in Lean 4?')

svg.text: — Issue 6: the one open mathematical problem that gates everything below —

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is Issue 6 and what would it take to prove χ(H*(X⁶))=33 for all n?')
g.text: χ(H*(X⁶)) = 33 for all n (verified n≤5 only)
n≤5. General proof is Vol VI.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the status of ADMIT-D the Collatz conjecture in AXLE?')
sendPrompt('Write all three closeable proofs: gronwall_contraction, ADMIT-A1, ADMIT-A1b, port A2 and A3 from v5')
sendPrompt('How should we present the Mathlib-blocked sorrys for IngramSpark publication?')
sendPrompt('How should we disclose Issue 6 and ADMIT-D in the IngramSpark book?')

svg.text: Click any row for the proof. Click any step to go deeper.
v2: zero sorry (ℕ only) → v3: 1 sorry (Mahlo) → v3c: zero sorry → v4: 1 sorry (club filter)
→ v5: zero sorry (regularity hypothesis explicit) → v6.1: 9 sorry (full GTCT+crystal) → v8.2: 6 sorry (GQM+Collatz added)
